title: Research Associate I
description: Memorial Sloan Kettering is one of the world's most prestigious cancer centers, treating 30K+ patients annually. You'll support groundbreaking cancer research as a Research Associate.
responsibilities: Coordinate clinical trial activities and participant enrollment
Collect and process biological specimens per protocol requirements
Maintain research records and ensure regulatory compliance
Monitor participant safety and report adverse events
Assist with data analysis and manuscript preparation
Support grant reporting and regulatory submissions

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in a biological science, nursing, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years of clinical research or laboratory experience

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
